assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Distributor Profit Percentage Distribuidor normal debe tener 20%
assertionResults.title: Distribuidor normal debe tener 20%

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Distributor Profit Percentage Distribuidor 3er lugar debe tener 21%
assertionResults.title: Distribuidor 3er lugar debe tener 21%

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Distributor Profit Percentage Distribuidor 2do lugar debe tener 23%
assertionResults.title: Distribuidor 2do lugar debe tener 23%

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Distributor Profit Percentage Distribuidor 1er lugar debe tener 25%
assertionResults.title: Distribuidor 1er lugar debe tener 25%

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Distributor Profit Percentage Admin debe tener 0%
assertionResults.title: Admin debe tener 0%

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - Normal (20%) Ganancia distribuidor = salePrice * 20% * quantity
assertionResults.title: Ganancia distribuidor = salePrice * 20% * quantity

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - Normal (20%) Pago distribuidor = salePrice * 80% * quantity
assertionResults.title: Pago distribuidor = salePrice * 80% * quantity

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - Normal (20%) Ganancia admin = (distributorPayment - cost) * quantity
assertionResults.title: Ganancia admin = (distributorPayment - cost) * quantity

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - Normal (20%) Ganancia total = distributorProfit + adminProfit
assertionResults.title: Ganancia total = distributorProfit + adminProfit

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - 1er Lugar (25%) Ganancia distribuidor = salePrice * 25% * quantity
assertionResults.title: Ganancia distribuidor = salePrice * 25% * quantity

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - 1er Lugar (25%) Pago distribuidor = salePrice * 75% * quantity
assertionResults.title: Pago distribuidor = salePrice * 75% * quantity

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - 1er Lugar (25%) Ganancia admin = (distributorPayment - cost) * quantity
assertionResults.title: Ganancia admin = (distributorPayment - cost) * quantity

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - 1er Lugar (25%) Ganancia total = distributorProfit + adminProfit
assertionResults.title: Ganancia total = distributorProfit + adminProfit

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - Admin Direct Sale Admin vende directamente - ganancia = (salePrice - cost) * quantity
assertionResults.title: Admin vende directamente - ganancia = (salePrice - cost) * quantity

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - Admin Direct Sale Admin vende directamente - distributorProfit = 0
assertionResults.title: Admin vende directamente - distributorProfit = 0

assertionResults.fullName: Business Logic - Profit Calculations Profit Formulas - Admin Direct Sale Admin vende directamente - totalProfit = adminProfit
assertionResults.title: Admin vende directamente - totalProfit = adminProfit

assertionResults.title: purchasePrice debe ser menor que distributorPrice

assertionResults.title: distributorPrice debe ser menor que salePrice

assertionResults.title: purchasePrice debe ser menor que salePrice
